examples: He went up to Pinocchio and began to pet and caress him.
Margaret took me to one side, holding my arm in a gentle caress.
She holds up her hands, letting the TENDRILS caress her.
When the shipment arrives sometime this month, Rohayu will swap the scratchy caress of claws for the patter of eight tiny, hairy feet.
Get put on hold often enough, wander through enough retail stores or tacky cocktail lounges, and sooner or later its limpid strains will caress you.
